task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the new Email Template creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new record form for 'Email Templates' is visible in the Odoo interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the template name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Opportunity Follow-Up' is entered into the Template Name field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct model is selected for the template.
Verify the subject line contains the required text and placeholder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field contains exactly 'Following up: {{ object.name }}'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required dynamic placeholders are present in the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body text area contains the exact strings '{{ object.partner_id.name }}' and '{{ object.name }}'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required static text phrases are present in the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body text area contains the phrases 'Thank you for your interest' and 'Best regards'.

task_completion.description: Verify the template has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The record appears in a saved state (e.g., 'Save' button is no longer active, 'Edit' button is visible, or a success notification is shown).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo GUI, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just edit the HTML of the page to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools open modifying the DOM to fake the template fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows with psql or other database clients are used to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The email template must be named 'Opportunity Follow-Up' and apply to the 'crm.lead' (Lead/Opportunity) model. The subject must be exactly 'Following up: {{ object.name }}'. The email body must contain the placeholders '{{ object.partner_id.name }}' and '{{ object.name }}', as well as the phrases 'Thank you for your interest' and 'Best regards' (case-insensitive for the static text).
